*353 brands total* (+8 today)

:link: *Suspicious — Third-party (54 brands)*
Majority of `purchase_website` entries point to external platforms. Top categories:

*Marketplaces:* BOXKITTY & Soar&Arrow (Coupang), Matchwood & Tumaz (Yahoo Shopping), Uma Hana (momo), 奕綢口罩 (Yahoo Auction), 嶼霧茶堂 (twbuystore), 金旗山城 (afasale.tw), 淡然有味 (LINE Gift), 川衣 (waca.ec), URNAVY (breezeonline), LEEDS WEATHER (citiesocial), CuCare (searchingc), KOPER & 布物設計 (books.com.tw)

*Price comparison:* Funmay, Gallop, YUE TRAVELER (biggo.com.tw), JadeGaze (biggo.hk), Desrochers x 曜生活 / Miss Luna / 京都奈口金包 (findprice.com.tw)

*Blog posts / media:* 10 brands on pixnet.net (Lisscode, Mittag Jewelry, PhotoFast, Sudio, Chez。城市系列, 森活小飾, 源作木坊…); LUCGLE (cool-style), Lotus Fitness (fashionguide), COLORSMITH (penguinma), Newstar ×2 (vocus.cc), Playmetoys (niusnews), odd CIRKUS (zhihu), nsòu (dcard), Fartech (douyin)

*Social / link-in-bio:* 暖木家居 (Threads), I am so good (portaly.cc), Southgate (LINE)

*Government PDF / no site:* 創設小物工作室 (taipeicdd.taipei PDF), 方粣/源作木坊/暖木家居 (no owned domain found)

*DB Health*
Top tables: `brands` (11 MB), `brand_ai_results` (9.2 MB), `storage.objects` (8 MB), `brand_search_results` (7.1 MB), `brand_faq` (5.4 MB)
Connections: 1 active / 19 idle / 0 idle-in-txn (22 total) — healthy

:red_circle: *Dead tuples > 20% — VACUUM needed:*
• `brands` — 21.3% dead (89 dead / 417 live)
• `brand_analytics` — 20.2% dead (99 dead / 490 live)

:red_circle: *Critical missing index — `brand_owners`:*
7,018,792 seq scans vs 158,541 idx scans (only 2.3% idx hit rate). Table is being full-scanned at massive scale. Add index on `brand_id` and/or `user_id`.
Also under-indexed: `pending_brand_edits` (19,640 seq), `moderation_flags` (14,063 seq), `claim_requests` (12,694 seq), `newsletter_subscribers` (9,746 seq)

Slow queries (pg_stat_statements): top mean 2,241ms (one-time DO $$ maintenance block); app query peak 776ms (image backfill CTE). No recurring slow app queries detected.

*Dependency Audit (Monday)*
